title: swertia alternifolia
intro: Swertia alternifolia, also known as Himalayan sweet root or kutki, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestive enzymes and improve liver function, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as liver and gallbladder issues, as well as digestive problems like constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Swertia alternifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve appetite, and reduce inflammation. Swertia alternifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
